5) Myth: FTX should have been 100% liquid

Truth: No margin exchange is 100% liquid; that's what margin implies

Customers, including Alameda, could opt in to margin trading by lending to and borrowing from a shared collateral pool.

Most assets on FTX were in the lending https://t.co/BLmvq86yvW

4) Myth: Bankruptcy is a crime, a liquidity crisis is a crime, that outfit is a crime, poor risk management is a crime

Truth: No it isn't, no it isn't, idgaf, no it isn't https://t.co/fI2GahjKfJ

3) Myth: When withdrawals spiked, I couldn't raise the cash, so I filed for bankruptcy

Truth: I had offers to cover the liquidity gap, but the lawyers filed for bankruptcy

Within 3 days, the offers were in. Withdrawals started to resume. The lawyers filed anyway. https://t.co/PPENtI7FDa
